description: Dataproc Metastore is Google Cloud’s managed Apache Hive metastore service for managing metastore services, federations, backups, and related metadata operations. It is used to provision and administer metastore infrastructure for data processing workloads on Google Cloud.
summary: metastore.googleapis.com exposes the Dataproc Metastore HTTP API at https://metastore.googleapis.com/ and a corresponding gcloud metastore CLI surface; auth is via Google Cloud OAuth access tokens or service-account-derived bearer tokens, and discovery docs also show API key query support.
